since_last: 40% of 100 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +0.85%; AI bubble risk 50 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 40% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.38% · BTC -0.96% · Gold -0.19% · Nasdaq100 -0.28%. 40% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.85%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.85%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -3.39%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SKHY is the standout at -6.95%
cards.body: Leaders: WDAY +2.45%, OKTA +2.41%, BIDU +2.36%, DLR +2.10%, AVAV +1.61%. Laggards: SKHY -6.95%, TSM -4.95%, MU -4.86%, TER -4.73%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.27% at $134.9
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.27% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
